originalityStatement: This synthetic contract fixture was authored for Storyteller validation and contains no source map, character, dialogue, audiovisual signature, or encounter sequence.
purpose: selection contract fixture for pattern.capability-recontextualizes-old-space; it defines an original scenario boundary and expected observable evidence, not a claim that a game runtime has already executed it.

recoveryRequirements: Preserve capability and learned affordance facts after failure
Disable the new edge if its destination cannot load
